all.summary:
Advantages (Pros)

   Service & Staff: Hands-on and kind owner; fast, efficient service even during rush hours; staff maintains high hygiene standards (hairnets, masks).
   Food Quality & Taste: Uses fresh ingredients; praised for authentic Filipino taste, especially Bicol Express, grilled fish, Sinigang, and desserts; consistent excellent meals; food served hot and well-presented.
   Hygiene & Cleanliness: Exceptional sanitation, noted as the cleanest restaurant; clean, wrapped utensils; no insects/flies; regularly wiped tables.
   Ambiance & Experience: Welcoming, comfortable, "feels like home" atmosphere; suitable for dates, friends, and groups; rustic interior design with a good music playlist.
   Value & Accessibility: Very accessible location; serving sizes justify the price; good selection of drinks.

Disadvantages (Cons)
   None mentioned in the provided reviews.
